title: Build the report generation workflow
summary: Create the input workflow for selecting target type, entering an ID, and requesting report generation.
deliverables: State handling for loading and errors
acceptance_criteria: Users can request a report for a project or group ID
The form handles invalid input and backend failures cleanly
verification: Manual local check or build-time validation of the page
notes: Use Shadcn-style inputs, buttons, and layout primitives.
